widgets.name: analog-clock
widgets.description: Analog clock face showing a given time.

widgets.name: number-line
widgets.description: A horizontal number line with tick marks, optional labels and a highlighted value.

widgets.name: fraction-bar
widgets.description: A rectangular bar split into equal parts with some parts shaded.

shaded.description: count of shaded parts, or array of 0-based indices

widgets.name: fraction-circle
widgets.description: A circle split into equal pie slices with some slices shaded.

shaded.description: count of shaded slices, or array of 0-based indices

widgets.name: array-dots
widgets.description: A rectangular array of dots for multiplication (rows x cols).

widgets.name: base-ten-blocks
widgets.description: Base-ten place-value blocks: hundreds (flats), tens (rods), ones (units).

widgets.name: shape
widgets.description: A named geometric shape with optional side/angle labels and rotation.

name.description: triangle | square | rectangle | pentagon | hexagon | circle

widgets.name: bar-model
widgets.description: Singapore-style bar model: one or more labeled bars sized by units, with an optional brace.

widgets.name: coordinate-grid
widgets.description: A first-quadrant coordinate plane with plotted points.

widgets.name: bar-chart
widgets.description: A simple vertical bar chart for categorical data.
